ai_tips: Starting out at 5m — 5.96km ahead with 9m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔5米出发——全程5.96公里，累计爬升9米。
0.49km in — pace 4:58/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.49公里——配速4:58/公里，强度正在建立。
Mid-run at 3.16km — the route is largely flat to downhill (total climb just 4m), so rhythm matters more than strength. 进行到3.16公里过半程——路线以平路和下坡为主（总爬升仅4米），节奏比力量更关键。
High point of the route: 9m at 5.94km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点9米，位于5.94公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Barely any descent on this route (steepest is just 0%) — the legs never got a real break. 这条路线几乎没有下坡（最陡仅0%）——双腿全程没有得到真正的放松。
5.96km — late-run check: pace walk/km, effort showing as the pace slips. 5.96公里——后程检查：配速walk/公里，疲劳显现，配速下滑。
Finished 5.96km in 38:41 (avg 6:29/km, +9m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成5.96公里，用时38:41（平均配速6:29/公里，爬升9米）。全程稳定扎实。
